men.summary: Group A and Group B pool play completed. Top 4 advanced from each group: Mansurni, Hafizh Furqan, Giffari Almuzani and Fariz Ridha from Group A; Aulia Moeda, Osman Saftari, Mursal Rajab and Arief Rahman from Group B.
Cross-group stage completed. Top 2 from each group advanced to the Semifinals: Mansurni and Osman Saftari from Group A; Aulia Moeda and Mursal Rajab from Group B.
Mansurni defeated Mursal Rajab 6-2. Aulia Moeda defeated Osman Saftari 6-2.
Mansurni defeated Aulia Moeda 6-3 to win the championship.

women.summary: 5-player round robin completed. Mauliza Arsita finished 1st (4-0), followed by Azwarni Islamiah, Noviana Putri, Fierda, and Lisa Zulmayeti.

doubles.summary: Group Stage completed across Group A and Group B. Arief / Moeda and Gipa / Mursal advanced from Group A; Fariz / Dian and Memed / Heri advanced from Group B.
Arief / Moeda defeated Memed / Heri 7-2. Gipa / Mursal defeated Fariz / Dian 7-1.
Arief / Moeda defeated Gipa / Mursal 7-3 to win the PIMTC 500 men's doubles championship.
